description: A land of breathtaking landscapes, Leh Ladakh is where snow-capped peaks, rugged mountains, crystal-clear lakes, and ancient monasteries come together. Known as the “Land of High Passes,” it offers adventure seekers thrilling road trips, trekking trails, river rafting, and the serenity of Buddhist culture. From the magnetic charm of Pangong Lake to the spirituality of monasteries and the adrenaline of Khardung La, Leh Ladakh is the perfect blend of thrill and tranquility.
name: THRILLING LEH LADAKH
